MODULE: cosmos.health.providers.apple_health
FILE: cosmos/health/providers/apple_health.py (365 lines)
CATEGORY: health

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Apple Health Provider

Integration with Apple Health via exported XML files.
Since Apple Health doesn't have a direct API, this parses export.xml files.

CLASSES:
- AppleHealthProvider(HealthProvider): Apple Health integration via XML export.

To export data from Apple Health:
1. O
  Methods: def supported_metrics(self) -> List[MetricType]
  Methods: def requires_oauth(self) -> bool
  Methods: def get_available_date_range(self) -> Optional[tuple]
